prompt: {"type":"Japanese promotional poster","style":"hyper-intense, fiery, dark realism, high contrast","centerpiece":"close-up of a furious Asian man screaming, glowing red eyes, popping veins, clenched fist, fiery aura, red lightning","layout":{"header":{"top_text":"{argument name=\"top headline\" default=\"全人類から極限の怒りを極限まで吸い上げた\"}","main_title":"{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"究極の激おこポスター\"}"},"middle":{"left_vertical_text":"{argument name=\"vertical text\" default=\"許せない。\"}","right_angled_text":"怒りの頂点、解放せよ!!","sales_badge":"circular gold badge with {argument name=\"sales figure\" default=\"135,000\"}"},"sections":[{"title":"features_grid","count":4,"labels":["怒り覚醒","ストレス破壊","限界突破","完全燃焼"]},{"title":"bonus_box","count":1,"labels":["今だけ！怒り爆発特典付き！"]},{"title":"price_and_variants","count":3,"price":"{argument name=\"price\" default=\"¥2,980\"}","labels":["怒火の赤","憤怒の黒","逆鱗の金"]}],"footer":"yellow warning triangle, red text: 注意 このポスターは、怒りの臨界点を超えます。"}}

breakdown.creativeCore: Intense Japanese Promotional Poster：Generates a highly detailed, fiery Japanese promotional poster with multiple text sections, feature grids, and product variants.
breakdown.subject: 产品
breakdown.bestUse: 活动海报、品牌主视觉、展览宣传、社媒封面

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 海报/封面 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: close-up, grid, vertical]。

Visual style:
[媒介/渲染方式/审美方向/色彩系统]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: high contrast]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
